Name: Sickle Cell Anemia
Description: Genetic disorder caused by a mutation in the HBB gene, leading to abnormal hemoglobin and sickle-shaped red blood cells.

Name: Cystic Fibrosis
Description: Caused by mutations in the CFTR gene, resulting in thick mucus affecting the lungs and digestive system.

Name: Huntington's Disease
Description: Neurodegenerative disorder caused by expanded CAG repeats in the HTT gene.

Name: Phenylketonuria (PKU)
Description: Metabolic disorder due to mutations in the PAH gene, leading to inability to break down phenylalanine.

Name: Tay-Sachs Disease
Description: Fatal genetic disorder caused by mutations in the HEXA gene, leading to accumulation of GM2 ganglioside in nerve cells.
